post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.heading_zh: 批量查询亚马逊搜索量 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_bulk_search_volume_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.desc_en: Returns Amazon search volume for a batch of keywords in a single request, so you can size demand across many keywords at once for the given location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.description_zh: 单次请求为一批关键词返回 Amazon 搜索量,便于在指定地区与语言下一次性衡量多个关键词的需求规模。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_product_keyword_intersections_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which the supplied Amazon products appear together in the same SERP, along with each product's SERP element per keyword, revealing where multiple ASINs compete or co-rank.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 返回所传 Amazon 商品在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,并给出每个关键词下各商品的 SERP 元素,揭示多个 ASIN 在何处竞争或同台排名。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品排名关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_ranked_keywords_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target ASIN ranks for in Amazon SERPs, each with keyword metrics and the product's ranking SERP element, for the given location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.description_zh: 返回目标 ASIN 在 Amazon SERP 中有排名的关键词,每个关键词附带关键词指标及该商品的排名 SERP 元素,按指定地区与语言限定。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用竞品 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_app_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.desc_en: Returns the apps that compete with a target App Store app across its ranking keywords, including each competitor's app ID and ranking metrics over the shared keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.description_zh: 返回在 App Store 上与目标应用争夺相同排名关键词的竞品应用,包含各竞品的应用 ID 及在共有关键词上的排名指标。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.heading_zh: 批量查询 App Store 应用指标 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bulk_app_metrics_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.desc_en: Returns App Store SERP ranking metrics for a batch of target apps in one request, letting you compare how multiple apps perform across their ranking keywords within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.description_zh: 单次请求为一批目标应用返回 App Store SERP 排名指标,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个应用在其排名关键词上的表现。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_available.desc_en: Returns the full list of fields usable in the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to. Call it to discover which fields each DataForSEO Labs endpoint supports for filtering and sorting.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_available.description_zh: 返回可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段清单,并按其适用的接口分组。可借此查明各 DataForSEO Labs 接口支持哪些字段进行筛选与排序。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_app_intersection_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which several Google Play apps appear together in the same SERP, revealing the keyword overlap among the apps you supply in app_ids.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.description_zh: 返回多个 Google Play 应用在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,揭示 app_ids 中所列应用之间的关键词重叠。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.heading_zh: 批量查询 Google Play 应用指标 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_bulk_app_metrics_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns Google Play SERP ranking metrics for a batch of target apps in one request, letting you compare how multiple apps perform across their ranking keywords within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 单次请求为一批目标应用返回 Google Play SERP 排名指标,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个应用在其排名关键词上的表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns estimated monthly Google search traffic for a batch of target domains, broken down by SERP result type, so you can compare traffic across many domains in one request.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 为一批目标域名返回 Google 搜索的估算月度流量,并按 SERP 结果类型拆分,便于单次请求横向比较多个域名的流量。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.heading_zh: 查询关键词类目可用语言 get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_categories_for_keywords_languages
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.desc_en: Returns the languages supported by the Categories for Keywords endpoint, listing each language's name and code so you can pick a valid language for that endpoint.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.description_zh: 返回 Categories for Keywords 接口所支持的语言,列出每种语言的名称与代码,便于为该接口选择有效语言。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_d.desc_en: Returns a domain's ranking distribution across SERP positions plus its estimated monthly organic and paid traffic, summarizing the domain's overall Google search presence.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_d.description_zh: 返回域名在各 SERP 位段的排名分布及其自然与付费的估算月度流量,概括该域名在 Google 搜索中的整体表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns the historical Google Ads metrics for each supplied keyword, including search volume, CPC, and competition over past months, so you can study how a keyword's demand has changed over time.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其历史 Google Ads 指标,包含过往各月的搜索量、CPC 与竞争度,便于研究关键词需求随时间的变化。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns keyword ideas relevant to the seed keywords by drawing on the categories the seeds belong to, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to expand a topic into a broader keyword set.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 依据种子关键词所属类目返回相关的关键词创意,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于把某个主题扩展为更广的关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns long-tail keyword suggestions that contain the seed keyword, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to find longer phrases built around the seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回包含种子关键词的长尾关键词联想,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于发现围绕种子词构成的更长短语。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns relevant keywords that belong to the supplied product and service categories, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to build a keyword set scoped to chosen categories.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回归属于所传产品与服务类目的相关关键词,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于构建限定于所选类目的关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords surfaced in Google's “searches related to” block for a seed keyword, expanded recursively by search depth, each enriched with keyword metrics, to grow a keyword set around a seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.description_zh: 返回 Google “相关搜索”模块中与种子关键词相关的关键词,可按搜索深度递归扩展,每个关键词附带关键词指标,用于围绕种子词扩充关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the predicted search intent of each supplied keyword, giving the primary intent label with its probability plus any secondary intents, so you can classify keywords by user intent.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其预测的搜索意图,给出主意图标签及其概率以及若干次意图,便于按用户意图对关键词分类。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the subdomains of a target domain together with each subdomain's ranking distribution and estimated organic and paid traffic, letting you see which subdomains drive the domain's search presence.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 返回目标域名的各个子域,并给出每个子域的排名分布及自然与付费的估算流量,便于查看哪些子域支撑了该域名的搜索表现。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.heading_zh: 查询数据更新状态 get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.desc_en: Returns the last data-update date for the DataForSEO Labs Google, Bing, and Amazon endpoints, so you can tell how fresh each engine's database is before querying.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.description_zh: 返回 DataForSEO Labs 中 Google、Bing 与 Amazon 各组接口的最近数据更新日期,便于在查询前了解各引擎数据库的新鲜度。

keywords.desc_en: Target keywords to process in one request; supplied in UTF-8 and converted to lowercase before matching.
keywords.title_zh: 单次请求要处理的目标关键词;以 UTF-8 提供,匹配前会被统一转为小写。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: List of all fields available for the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to.
tasks.result.title_zh: 可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段列表,按其适用的接口分组。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.search_volume.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

asins.desc_en: Target products' ASINs to pull ranking data for in one batch; obtain each ASIN from the Amazon Products endpoint and supply them in uppercase.
asins.title_zh: 需批量获取排名数据的目标商品 ASIN 列表;每个 ASIN 可从 Amazon Products 接口获取,需以大写形式提供。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

intersection_mode.desc_en: How the supplied ASINs are matched against keywords: intersect keeps only keywords where every ASIN co-ranks, while union keeps keywords where any of them ranks.
intersection_mode.title_zh: 所传 ASIN 与关键词的匹配方式:intersect 仅保留全部 ASIN 同台排名的关键词,union 则保留其中任一 ASIN 有排名的关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

keywords.desc_en: Target keywords to process in one request; supplied in UTF-8 and converted to lowercase before matching.
keywords.title_zh: 单次请求要处理的目标关键词;以 UTF-8 提供,匹配前会被统一转为小写。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

closely_variants.desc_en: Selects the match algorithm: true uses phrase-match, false uses broad-match, which widens the returned keyword set.
closely_variants.title_zh: 选择匹配算法:true 采用 phrase-match(短语匹配),false 采用 broad-match(广泛匹配),后者会扩大返回的关键词集。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination cursor for fetching subsequent pages beyond the offset limit; pass back the offset_token value returned in the previous response. Each token is single-use for the next page.
offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取超出 offset 上限后续结果的分页游标;回传上一次响应中返回的 offset_token 值。每个 token 仅对应下一页且一次性使用。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: List of all fields available for the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to.
tasks.result.title_zh: 可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段列表,按其适用的接口分组。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.seed_keywords.desc_en: Keywords echoed from the request, with URL-encoding decoded.
tasks.result.seed_keywords.title_zh: 从请求回传的关键词,已对 URL 编码解码。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.

tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.

tasks.result.offset.desc_en: Offset applied to this result page.
tasks.result.offset.title_zh: 本结果页所应用的偏移量。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Single-use cursor to fetch the next page of results; pass it back as the request's offset_token.

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众的性别构成。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流数据集中男性用户的数量。

keyword.desc_en: Seed keyword to expand from; specify it in lowercase using UTF-8 encoding.
keyword.title_zh: 用于扩展的种子关键词;需使用 UTF-8 编码并以小写形式指定。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_seed_keyword.desc_en: When true, also returns data for the seed keyword itself in the seed_keyword_data block of the response.
include_seed_keyword.title_zh: 为 true 时,响应的 seed_keyword_data 块中会一并返回种子关键词自身的数据。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

exact_match.desc_en: When true, returned keywords must contain the exact seed phrase (other words may appear before or after it).
exact_match.title_zh: 为 true 时,返回的关键词须包含完整的种子短语(短语前后可有其他词)。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination cursor for fetching subsequent pages beyond the offset limit; pass back the offset_token value returned in the previous response. Each token is single-use for the next page.
offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取超出 offset 上限后续结果的分页游标;回传上一次响应中返回的 offset_token 值。每个 token 仅对应下一页且一次性使用。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: List of all fields available for the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to.
tasks.result.title_zh: 可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段列表,按其适用的接口分组。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.seed_keyword.title_zh: 从请求回传的种子关键词。

tasks.result.seed_keyword_data.title_zh: 种子关键词自身的关键词数据,结构与各 item 的 keyword_data 一致。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Breakdown of the clickstream audience by gender.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众的性别构成。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流数据集中女性用户的数量。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Count of male users in the clickstream dataset.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流数据集中男性用户的数量。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Breakdown of the clickstream audience by age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众的年龄段构成。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.desc_en: Additional descriptive properties of the keyword (clustering, difficulty, language).

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.se.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.desc_en: True when the detected keyword language differs from the language set in the request.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.title_zh: 当检测到的关键词语言与请求所设语言不一致时为 true。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.wo.desc_en: Number of words the keyword phrase consists of.

tasks.result.items.serp_info.desc_en: SERP-level data for the keyword; null unless include_serp_info was set and SERP data exists for the keyword.

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.

tasks.result.items.serp_info.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search results, usable to verify the returned data.

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_results_.desc_en: Number of search results the engine reports for the keyword.

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.ra.desc_en: Average page-level rank score among the top-ranking pages.

tasks.result.items.search_intent_info.ma.desc_en: Primary search intent of the keyword (informational, navigational, commercial, or transactional).

tasks.result.items.search_intent_info.fo.desc_en: Secondary search intents the keyword also exhibits, beyond the main one.

category_codes.desc_en: Product and service category codes to draw keywords from; the full category list is downloadable from DataForSEO.
category_codes.title_zh: 用于取关键词的产品与服务类目代码;完整类目清单可从 DataForSEO 下载。
category_codes.annotation: 源码注明单次请求的类目数量上限,但该上限请以原生 description 为准,待研发确认。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

category_intersection.desc_en: When true, returns only keywords featured in all specified categories; when false, returns keywords featured in any of them.
category_intersection.title_zh: 为 true 时,仅返回归属于全部所指定类目的关键词;为 false 时,返回归属于其中任一类目的关键词。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination cursor for fetching subsequent pages beyond the offset limit; pass back the offset_token value returned in the previous response. Each token is single-use for the next page.
offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取超出 offset 上限后续结果的分页游标;回传上一次响应中返回的 offset_token 值。每个 token 仅对应下一页且一次性使用。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: List of all fields available for the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to.
tasks.result.title_zh: 可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段列表,按其适用的接口分组。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.seed_categories.desc_en: Category codes echoed from the request that the returned keyword ideas were derived from.
tasks.result.seed_categories.title_zh: 从请求回传的类目代码,所返回的关键词创意即由其推导而来。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.offset.desc_en: Offset applied to this result page.
tasks.result.offset.title_zh: 本结果页所应用的偏移量。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Single-use cursor to fetch the next page of results; pass it back as the request's offset_token.
tasks.result.offset_token.title_zh: 用于获取下一页结果的一次性游标;作为请求的 offset_token 回传。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.desc_en: Core keyword metrics block (volume, competition, bids, categories, and history).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.title_zh: 核心关键词指标块(搜索量、竞争度、出价、类目与历史)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Relative amount of paid competition for the keyword, derived from Google Ads data on a 0-to-1 scale.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词的相对付费竞争程度,基于 Google Ads 数据,取值范围 0 至 1。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Bucketed paid-competition level for the keyword; LOW, MEDIUM, and HIGH denote increasing competition, and an unknown level is null.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词付费竞争的分档:LOW、MEDIUM、HIGH 依次表示竞争由低到高,未知时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost per click for the keyword, in USD.

keyword.desc_en: Seed keyword to expand from; specify it in lowercase using UTF-8 encoding.
keyword.title_zh: 用于扩展的种子关键词;需使用 UTF-8 编码并以小写形式指定。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

depth.desc_en: Recursion depth for related-keyword expansion: higher levels traverse further into related searches and return progressively more keywords.
depth.title_zh: 相关关键词扩展的递归深度:层级越高,向相关搜索深入得越远,返回的关键词也越多。

include_seed_keyword.desc_en: When true, also returns data for the seed keyword itself in the seed_keyword_data block of the response.
include_seed_keyword.title_zh: 为 true 时,响应的 seed_keyword_data 块中会一并返回种子关键词自身的数据。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

replace_with_core_keyword.desc_en: When true, serp_info and related_keywords are returned for the core keyword of the cluster the seed belongs to; when false, for the seed keyword itself.
replace_with_core_keyword.title_zh: 为 true 时,serp_info 与 related_keywords 针对种子词所属簇的核心关键词返回;为 false 时,针对种子词自身返回。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

historical_serp_mode.desc_en: Controls which SERPs are counted: live keeps only SERPs where the target currently ranks, while lost keeps SERPs where it ranked before but no longer does.
historical_serp_mode.title_zh: 控制纳入统计的 SERP 范围:live 仅保留目标当前仍有排名的 SERP,lost 则保留目标曾经有过、现已失去排名的 SERP。

ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
